description_long: This object consists of two adjacent residential houses, each with a gable roof and surrounded by a few trees and paved driveways. The left house features a red brick facade, white-framed windows, and a small front porch, while the right house is finished in a light gray exterior with similar window arrangements. Both houses have visible chimneys and are set back from a main road, with driveways leading up to their respective garages. The landscaping includes mature green trees and a conical evergreen, adding a suburban neighborhood feel. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the roofs are steeply pitched, typical of traditional American homes. The overall scene is compact, representing a small residential cluster.
description: Two adjacent suburban houses with gable roofs, brick and gray exteriors, driveways, and surrounding trees, set along a main road.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, their driveways, and the main road, with trees flanking the buildings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, the driveways, and the placement of trees between and behind the houses.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back sides of both houses, the garages, and the trees lining the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other side of the houses, with visible driveways and tree placement.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature small porches with steps, simple doors, and minimal decorative elements.
